title: Family & Matrimonial Law
description: Divorce, custody, maintenance, adoption, domestic violence protection, matrimonial disputes.

title: Criminal Defense
description: Bail applications, anticipatory bail, trial defense, FIR quashing, criminal appeals.

title: Property & Real Estate
description: Property disputes, title clearance, RERA complaints, landlord-tenant matters, encroachment.

title: Corporate & Business Law
description: Company formation, mergers & acquisitions, SEBI compliance, contract drafting, commercial disputes.

title: Consumer Protection
description: Consumer forum complaints, defective goods, service deficiency, unfair trade practices.

title: Cyber Law
description: Cybercrime complaints, online fraud, data breach, defamation, IT Act offenses.

title: Cheque Bounce / NI Act
description: Section 138 NI Act cases, legal notices, compounding, recovery of dues.

title: Labour & Employment
description: Wrongful termination, PF/ESI disputes, sexual harassment, labour court matters.

title: GST & Tax Law
description: GST registration, notices, appeals, income tax disputes, tax planning.

title: Intellectual Property
description: Trademark, patent, copyright registration and infringement cases.

title: NRI Legal Services
description: Property management, Power of Attorney, OCI matters, NRI banking disputes.

title: PIL & High Court
description: Public Interest Litigation, constitutional matters, writ petitions, fundamental rights.
